description: You are the On-Call SRE. The staging environment is reporting downtime because a web proxy service on the remote host 'staging-node' has crashed. You do NOT have SSH access to the node, but the Docker API is exposed on port 2375. Connect to the remote host using a docker context named 'staging' (tcp://staging-node:2375). Diagnose the 'web-proxy' container failure and replace it with a functional 'web-proxy' container using the 'nginx:alpine' image and port mapping 8080:80, ensuring the missing environment variable is corrected. Login credentials: user 'ga', password 'password123'.
